message:
test(fuzz): add libfuzzer harnesses for guard path normalization and storage WBQ enqueue

Stand up cargo-fuzz-based libfuzzer harnesses for two hot untrusted-input
paths in the guard and storage crates, plus the fuzz-only wrapper
functions those harnesses need to reach into the crates without
exposing internals in normal builds.

mcp-agent-mail-guard
- Cargo.toml: add `[lints.rust]` with `unexpected_cfgs = { level =
  "warn", check-cfg = ["cfg(fuzzing)"] }` so the `cfg(fuzzing)`-gated
  helpers don't trip the new Rust 1.80+ unexpected-cfg lint in
  non-fuzz builds.
- src/lib.rs: four `#[cfg(fuzzing)] pub fn fuzz_*` wrappers —
    fuzz_normalize_path(path, ignorecase) -> String
    fuzz_contains_glob(pattern) -> bool
    fuzz_parse_name_status_z(raw) -> GuardResult<Vec<String>>
    fuzz_check_path_conflicts(paths, reservations, self_agent,
                              ignorecase) -> GuardResult<Vec<GuardConflict>>
  These are the narrow entry points the harnesses call; the real
  functions stay private-module-scope.
- fuzz/ directory (new): cargo-fuzz package
    fuzz/Cargo.toml — arbitrary 1.4.2, libfuzzer-sys 0.4.12,
      mcp-agent-mail-guard path dep, and the workspace's full
      [patch.crates-io] table so the fuzz package links against the
      same sibling-repo path deps (fastmcp_rust, sqlmodel_rust,
      frankensqlite, etc.) as the main workspace.
    fuzz/fuzz_targets/guard_name_status.rs — exercises
      parse_name_status_z on arbitrary bytes.
    fuzz/fuzz_targets/guard_conflict_symmetry.rs — exercises
      check_path_conflicts with Arbitrary-derived inputs and asserts
      the guard's self-vs-other conflict decision is symmetric.
    fuzz/corpus/guard_name_status/ and
      fuzz/corpus/guard_conflict_symmetry/ seeded (empty today; the
      fuzzer will populate them on first run).
    fuzz/artifacts/ created so crash artifacts have a home.
    fuzz/Cargo.lock committed (cargo-fuzz convention).

mcp-agent-mail-storage
- Cargo.toml: same `[lints.rust] unexpected_cfgs` allow for
  `cfg(fuzzing)`.
- src/lib.rs:
    FuzzWbqEnqueueOutcome struct (result + depth +
      remaining_messages) so the harness can assert invariants on
      the observable aftermath of an enqueue.
    fuzz_wbq_enqueue_scenario(capacity, prefill, drop_receiver,
      disk_pressure_level) -> FuzzWbqEnqueueOutcome — sets up a
      sync_channel of clamped capacity, prefills with ClearSignal
      envelopes, optionally drops the receiver, then runs a single
      enqueue. Returns the outcome so the fuzzer can trip assertions.
- fuzz/ directory (new):
    fuzz/Cargo.toml — mirrors the guard fuzz package; same patch
      table; mcp-agent-mail-storage path dep.
    fuzz/fuzz_targets/storage_wbq_enqueue.rs — Arbitrary-derived
      capacity / prefill / drop-flag inputs through the new scenario
      helper.
    fuzz/fuzz_targets/storage_commit_coalescer.rs — companion
      harness for the commit-coalescer happy path.
    fuzz/Cargo.lock committed.

All four harnesses are `#[cfg(fuzzing)]`-gated so `cargo build` on
the main workspace never pulls cargo-fuzz in; `cargo fuzz run <name>`
from within each `fuzz/` dir is the entry point.
